description_long: This is a tall, rectangular wooden stool with a rustic, weathered finish, featuring a simple and robust construction. The stool has four thick, square legs that extend vertically from the ground to the seat, providing sturdy support. A flat, solid wooden seat sits atop the legs, with visible wood grain and natural imperfections that add to its character. There is a single horizontal support bar connecting the legs near the base, which also serves as a footrest. The stool lacks any backrest or armrests, emphasizing its utilitarian design. Its overall appearance suggests durability and suitability for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A tall, rustic wooden stool with four square legs, a flat seat, and a single footrest bar. The wood is weathered, giving it a sturdy and utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat seat, four square legs, and the horizontal footrest bar clearly visible between the legs.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, highlighting the thickness of the legs and the footrest bar's alignment.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, with the same visibility of the seat, legs, and footrest bar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the robust legs and footrest bar, with the wood grain visible on the seat.
